description: List of Italianate names and corresponding monetary values, perhaps communal contributions. The paleography, ink, and pre-lined paper all point to the nineteenth century as a likely dating estimate. On the recto the names Lieto Griyani and Shalom Kohen appear. On the verso: Aharon Barsano, Vita Revaḥ, and Vita Shalom. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בHebrew, Italian. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
